description:
All your chats in one app. Yes, really.

A single app to chat on iMessage, WhatsApp, and 13 other chat networks. You can search, snooze, or archive messages. And with a unified inbox, you’ll never miss a message again.
New
Added a search bar to the Settings window
Fixed & Improved
iMessage: Fixed reactions on Tahoe and Sequoia
Performance improvements to make chat catchup faster when you open the app
Fixed cases where some users saw missing names and avatars for people in their chats
Fixed a few bugs with unread counts and chats showing up in the wrong space, after last release’s filters and Space Bar redesign
Fixed Remind Me to correctly use “If no reply” when that’s your default setting
Fixed some broken icons on Windows and Linux
Fixed bug causing your contacts to not all show when creating group Google Messages chats
